name: GBank Financial Holdings Inc.
business: GBank Financial Holdings Inc. provides commercial banking services including loans, deposits, and government-guaranteed lending programs, primarily to small- and medium-sized businesses, high net worth individuals, professionals, and investors. It also offers gaming fintech solutions such as prepaid debit cards and a credit card designed for online gaming and sports betting users.
sellsTo: online gaming and sports betting users

exposures.sentence: the Bank has key businesses in three prominent products: government guaranteed lending, Gaming FinTech, and commercial banking.
The GBank Visa Signature credit card is a niche financial product designed primarily for online gaming and sports betting users.
